scripts.version: npm pkg set version=$npm_package_version -w banira -w banira-cli && npm pkg set dependencies.banira=$npm_package_version -w banira-cli -w @banira/component-my-circle && npm install --package-lock-only && git add packages/banira/package.json packages/banira-cli/package.json packages/component-my-circle/package.json package-lock.json
scripts.reset: make clean && make bootstrap && make test && make docs
